title: Aquaculture 2
description: Spices up fishing with a number of new biome-specific fish, recipes, and more!
body:
Aquaculture 2 Only works with NeoForge from 1.20.4 and onwards Aquaculture 2 expands the fishing system in Minecraft with over 30 new fish to catch either with a rod (any modded or vanilla rod will work!) or found swimming in the wild. It also adds a series of new rods which allows you to equip hooks & bait for additional functionality. Customized fishing Line & bobbers are also available to make your fishing rod truly unique. Modifiers & customization items can be applied in the Tackle Box, which also allows you to store additional hooks, bait, line & bobbers. Each biome type - even modded biomes - have new types of fish that'll spruce up your fishing experience and your world with fish mobs swimming around in rivers, ponds and the ocean! The fish caught can be turned into fish fillets, the amount of fish fillets will depend on the fish  (Or weight, if the config option is enabled). Furthermore, you can get shiny new loot while fishing! (Including the fabled Neptunium tools or armor!  (Configurable)) ### The Fishables **Freshwater** ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/smallmouth_bass.png)  Smallmouth Bass

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/capitaine.png) Capitaine (Nile Perch) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/synodontis.png) Synodontis **Arctic Ocean** ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/atlantic_cod.png) Atlantic Cod ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/blackfish.png) Blackfish ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/pacific_halibut.png) Pacific Halibut ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/atlantic_halibut.png) Atlantic Halibut ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/atlantic_herring.png) Atlantic Herring ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/pink_salmon.png) Pink Salmon (Also in rivers)
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/pollock.png) Pollock ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/rainbow_trout.png)  Rainbow Trout
 **Saltwater** ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/jellyfish.png) Jellyfish ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/red_grouper.png) Red Grouper ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/tuna.png) Tuna **Jungle** ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/arapaima.png) Arapaima ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/master/src/main/resources/assets/aquaculture/textures/item/arrau_turtle.png)  Arrau Turtle

![](https://i.imgur.com/LAbUJvv.png)  Neptune's Bounty ## **Recipes** ![](https://imgur.com/eIhwDzY.png)![](https://imgur.com/YsNSkYT.png)![](https://imgur.com/aBSP9nX.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/o3kgm9R.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/ouVs6g4.png)  ## **Screenshots** ## **![](https://i.imgur.com/WcjgaH5.png)** ## **![](https://i.imgur.com/0MZrLtW.png)** ## **![](https://i.imgur.com/cdhuHrf.png)** ## ![](https://i.imgur.com/Pee4rVN.png) ## **Media** [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/605cce8d047512b8c1765be97900f2a3235e5530.png)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLFq6KXy6_gov6zQzCcFa_VirNZcZLtcVP) [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3a35195c9093a99879df32b1b2218e2c0a3b98c.png)](https://discordapp.com/invite/TuJXw7V) ## **Older versions** All older versions can be found on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) ## **Rights of Use** **You as the user may do the following with this mod without asking my permission.** \-You **may** create videos or take screenshots and post them anywhere you please, I just ask that you note what the mod is and let people know where to get it. \-You **may** add it to a modpack as long as the modpack gives proper credit and links back to this page. **You as the user, may NOT do the following with the mod.** \-You **cannot** redistribute or re-upload this mod without permission! \-You **cannot** decompile the code or reuse the artwork for other mods, special circumstances may be granted upon request!
